epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ACR/EULAR 2010 criteria, RF and anti-CCP antibodies

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: early arthritis clinics in many countries

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat-to-target strategy: methotrexate first-line, biologics (TNF inhibitors, JAK inhibitors) widely accessible, early arthritis clinics
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High biologic costs straining healthcare budgets, disparities in Eastern EU access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EULAR treat-to-target guidelines, high rheumatologist density, early arthritis clinics, wide biologic/biosimilar access
